SelectedInfo: Selected: row {{row}}, col {{col}}. Drag to move, use ↶ ↷ to rotate.
HintFreeBuild: Click or drag blocks onto the grid. Select a block to rotate it.
LevelBridgeDesc: Build a bridge! Place 5 blocks in a horizontal row to cross the gap.
LevelTowerDesc: Build the tallest tower! Stack 6 blocks in a single column.
LevelCarDesc: Build a car! Use 2 wheels (bottom) and 2 blocks (top) in a row.
LevelHouseDesc: Create a simple house! Use 1 slope for the roof and 3 cubes for the walls.
LevelPyramidDesc: Build a 3-layer pyramid: 3 blocks on bottom, 2 in middle, 1 on top.
TutoExplainContent: BlockCraft is a digital building sandbox. Place blocks, build structures, and complete challenges!
TutoPaletteContent: Choose a block type and color. Drag blocks onto the grid or click to place. Use the eraser to delete.
TutoGridContent: Click on a cell to place your selected block. Drag placed blocks to move them. Select a block and use the rotate buttons.
TutoLevelContent: Switch to Level Mode for challenge-based building with specific goals and limited blocks.
